content: Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative self-optimization can be enhanced by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to unlock faster, higher-quality refinement that still preserves Self-Refine's core advantage of no extra training or supervision. This creates a hybrid framework that leverages both iterative self-feedback and perspective diversity to avoid local optimum traps that single-perspective self-refinement often falls into.
